meta_data.format_citation: Purcell, S., Neale, B., Todd-Brown, K., Thomas, L., Ferreira, M. A., Bender, D., ... & Sham, P. C. (2007). PLINK: a tool set for whole-genome association and population-based linkage analyses. The American journal of human genetics, 81(3), 559-575.
meta_data.format_description: Multi-covariate logistic regression from --logistic. BETA column appears with '--logistic beta'; otherwise OR. With --ci 0.xy, SE, L_xy, U_xy are inserted before STAT (SE is on log-odds scale).

header_description.NMISS: Observations with nonmissing genotype, phenotype, and covariates
header_description.L95: Lower end of symmetric approx. CI for OR (--ci)
header_description.U95: Upper end of symmetric approx. CI for OR (--ci)
